_readme: Edit this file to update the app; refresh the page (no rebuild). roles[].id and questions[].role must match; round is 1/2/3. 'model' is the live 3D avatar. Default 'models/face.glb' is bundled and needs NO internet. To use your own Ready Player Me avatar instead, put the full https URL here ending in .glb and keep '?morphTargets=ARKit,Oculus Visemes'. Set model to "" to use the photo.

roles.title: Marketing
roles.subTitle: Coordinator / Digital
roles.description: Covers global brand positioning, performance marketing metrics (ROI, CTR), conversion funnels, and localization.

roles.title: Data Analysis
roles.subTitle: Data / BI Analyst
roles.description: Covers SQL performance tuning, dashboard storytelling, business intelligence modeling, and explaining metrics to partners.

roles.title: AI / ML
roles.subTitle: Data Scientist / MLE
roles.description: Covers training pipelines, LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and cost-performance trade-offs.

interviewers.name: David
interviewers.description: Warm, encouraging, and clear. Great for behavioural narratives and first screens.

interviewers.name: Sora
interviewers.description: Structured, analytical, and supportive. Focuses on problem-solving and leadership.

interviewers.name: Ethan
interviewers.description: Technical, forward-thinking, and friendly. Best for system design and deep dives.

questions.text: Could you introduce yourself and walk me through a successful digital campaign you led recently?
questions.scenario: Tell me about yourself & Campaign walk-through

questions.text: Why are you interested in our global marketing position, and how do you think your past experience aligns?
How do you structure your campaign planning from initial goal setting to final launch?
Describe a time you worked with an international team. How did you coordinate with them?
What digital marketing metrics do you check first thing in the morning, and why?
How do you adapt your marketing messages when launching in a completely new international market?
Tell me about a time you had to learn a new marketing tool or channel quickly. How did you approach it?
How do you handle feedback from senior executives who want to change your creative assets at the last minute?
Imagine client acquisition cost (CAC) jumped 35% last month while conversions dropped. What steps do you take to audit?
How would you launch a new B2B product on a tight $10,000 budget?
Tell me about a campaign you ran that did not meet its target. What did you learn?
How do you design and prioritize creative content ideas for different social media platforms?
How do you leverage SEO and organic search to drive long-term traffic sustainability?
How do you evaluate and collaborate with key influencers (KOLs) to maximize ROI?
Describe a project where you successfully used marketing automation to nurture cold leads into active buyers.
How do you design an A/B test for landing page headlines, and what metrics determine the true winner?
You disagree with the engineering team on product positioning. How do you resolve this conflict?
Our competitor launches a feature matching ours tomorrow. How do you adjust our marketing campaign overnight?
How do you justify your marketing budget request to the CFO who only values short-term sales metrics?
Where do you see digital marketing evolving with generative AI over the next three years?
How do you measure brand equity and brand awareness during a massive brand transformation campaign?
How would you devise a digital marketing recovery strategy for a product suffering from a sudden public relations crisis?
If our target customer acquisition channel becomes fully saturated, how do you discover and validate the next growth channel?
How do you establish attribution models across complex multi-touch campaigns to correctly allocate spend?
Can you introduce yourself and describe how your data insights have directly driven business decisions or growth?
What tools and programming languages do you prefer for data analysis, and what is your process for data cleaning?
Tell me about a complex dashboard you built. Who were the users, and how did it change their daily operations?
How do you handle incomplete or highly noisy data when tasked with urgent reporting requirements?
Explain the difference between a join and a subquery in SQL, and when would you optimize one over the other?
How do you ensure your metrics definitions are consistent across different business departments?
Describe how you balance detail-oriented documentation with rapid speed of analysis delivery.
What is your strategy for communicating highly technical data concepts to absolute beginners in sales?
We see a sudden 15% drop in weekly active users (WAU) on our platform. Walk me through your diagnostics.
How do you set up an A/B test? How would you explain statistical significance to a non-technical sales manager?
Describe a situation where your analysis disproved a popular assumption held by management. How did you share this?
questions.scenario: Scientific rigor & Diplomacy when delivering bad news

questions.text: How do you define and measure cohort retention, and why is it more critical than raw registration numbers?
How do you handle multiple conflicting ad-hoc data requests from marketing, operations, and executives?
What are SQL Window Functions? Can you share a real scenario where you used them for complex sorting or running totals?
questions.scenario: SQL Window Functions & Advanced data queries

questions.text: Tell me about how you analyze the user journey and drop-off rates across a complex registration funnel.
How do you distinguish between correlation and causation in your everyday data analysis reports?
How do you maintain data governance, quality, and single-source-of-truth in a rapidly scaling company?
Walk me through how you would model and predict customer churn using basic logistic models or exploratory analytics.
What is your strategy for choosing which data warehousing tool (e.g. BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift) is best for a team?
questions.scenario: Data architecture selection & Budget constraint balancing

questions.text: What are the ethical implications of data collection and targeted advertising that an analyst must always guard against?
Can you give an example of how you used external macroeconomic data to enrich your internal consumer reports?
How do you approach designing a brand new data mart or schema structure from scratch for a new business line?
questions.scenario: Data modeling & Schema design best practices

questions.text: If our tracking scripts fail and we lose key transactional data for 2 days, how would you mathematically impute the missing data?
questions.scenario: Missing data imputation & Advanced statistical estimation

questions.text: How do you evaluate whether we should purchase a premium third-party BI platform versus building custom visualization tools in-house?
Can you introduce yourself and walk me through a machine learning pipeline you designed for production?
How do you stay updated with rapid advances in LLMs, deep learning models, and research papers?
questions.scenario: Lifelong tech learning & Paper research habits

questions.text: Explain the difference between bias and variance, and describe the specific methods you use to diagnose overfitting.
What is your favorite deep learning framework (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow) and why is it your tool of choice?
Describe a time you collaborated with software engineers to integrate your ML models into an existing application microservice.
How do you explain a complex model prediction (like deep neural networks) to non-technical business partners?
What are your preferred tools and methodologies for data labeling and ensuring label quality in massive datasets?
Describe a situation where a simple heuristic or baseline outperformed a complex ML model. How did you react?
We need to build a customer service agent using LLMs but have very limited labeled data. What tuning or RAG pipeline would you recommend?
questions.scenario: LLMs fine-tuning strategy & Retrieval-augmented generation design

questions.text: Our recommendation system is experiencing high latency of 300ms causing drops in conversion. How do you optimize inference speed?
How do you handle data drift or concept drift in production models, and how do you set up automatic retraining triggers?
questions.scenario: MLOps & Active model monitoring / retraining pipelines

questions.text: Describe how you would design a training dataset to minimize demographic bias in a global image processing or sentiment model.
questions.scenario: Algorithmic fairness & Bias mitigation in training data

questions.text: How do you design validation splits for timeseries forecasting to avoid future data leakage during offline training?
Can you compare fine-tuning an LLM using LoRA versus prompting it with standard RAG? What are the resource and performance trade-offs?
questions.scenario: LoRA fine-tuning vs. RAG architectural comparison

questions.text: How do you debug an active neural network training process when loss values suddenly diverge or hit NaN?
What embedding models and vector indexing algorithms (like HNSW or IVF-PQ) would you select for a billion-scale similarity search?
questions.scenario: Vector database selection & Huge index optimization

questions.text: Describe a time when your ML model performed perfectly in training but completely failed in production. How did you diagnose and patch it?
Advanced LLM training needs high GPU costs. If the engineering leadership rejects your architecture due to budget constraints, how do you handle it?
How do you evaluate the reliability and alignment of a generative AI feature before rolling it out to million active users?
questions.scenario: GenAI evaluation benchmarks, red-teaming, & Safe rollouts

questions.text: Should we build our proprietary models or consume hosted APIs (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini)? Walk me through your decision framework.
questions.scenario: Make-vs-Buy architectural analysis for Enterprise AI

questions.text: Explain how attention mechanism works in simple terms, as if you were explaining it to our product manager.
questions.scenario: Explaining complex mathematical concepts with supreme simplicity

questions.text: What is your strategy for implementing continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) for complex machine learning models?
How do you design an evaluation pipeline to measure Hallucination rate in a customer-facing RAG application?
Describe how distributed model training strategies like ZeRO (Zero Redundancy Optimizer) optimize memory footprint across multi-node clusters.
